name: Voice Browser Desktop Smoke Test
description: Repeat Raul's quick voice-driven Prometheus smoke test: open/search X for an AI-related topic, scroll it, focus Codex, then focus Claude, and only report after the tool-backed sequence completes.
triggers: go look for things about ai then focus codex and claude
open x search and focus codex
open x search then focus claude
x search ai scroll codex claude
interrupt me during the browser desktop test

resources.description: 2026-05-21 guardrail example for honoring stop/steer interruptions during the voice browser-desktop smoke test and avoiding stale completion after cancellation.
